description:
Pure verification. Independent of any other ticket.

## Motivation

fz-duq.2's design rests on a claim: the inliner collapses per-arm
cont fns back into the caller for branching constructs with leaf
arms, so post-inline CLIF matches the pre-fz-duq block-join shape.
Manual verification via `fz dump --emit clif` confirms this for
simple cases (verified during fz-duq design + post-merge), but
there's no test gate that catches a future inliner regression.

## Add test

In `src/ir_inline.rs::tests` (or wherever inliner tests live):

```rust
#[test]
fn branching_construct_with_leaf_arms_collapses_to_single_fn() {
    use crate::ir_codegen::compile;
    let m = lower_src("fn pos(x), do: if x > 0, do: 1, else: -1");
    let compiled = compile(&m).unwrap();
    // Post-inline + post-DCE, `pos` should be one CLIF fn — the
    // if_then / if_else cont fns inlined back. Test for absence of
    // residual cont fns by name.
    let module = compiled.debug_module(); // or however the compiled
                                           // module exposes its fn list
    let cont_fns: Vec<_> = module.fns.iter()
        .filter(|f| f.name.starts_with("if_then") || f.name.starts_with("if_else") || f.name.starts_with("if_join"))
        .collect();
    assert!(
        cont_fns.is_empty(),
        "expected per-arm cont fns to be inlined away for leaf-arm if; found: {:?}",
        cont_fns.iter().map(|f| &f.name).collect::<Vec<_>>(),
    );
}
```

(API surface for "what fns survive into the compiled module" may
need a small accessor — fine; document the addition.)

## What this adds, removes, replaces

- **Adds:** one regression test.
- **Removes:** nothing today.
- **Replaces:** manual `fz dump --emit clif` spot-checking with an
  automated gate.

## Acceptance

- Test passes today (verified manually for fz-duq.2).
- If the inliner ever stops collapsing in the future, this test
  fires before anyone notices the golden CLIF drift on real fixtures.

## Out of scope

Extending the gate to case/cond/with leaf arms. Same shape; do that
as follow-up if this one catches anything useful.
title: inliner gate test: leaf-arm branching collapses to single fn post-inline
